independence.mode0_rederivation: leading right mode from eig(A A^T), not direct SVD
independence.statistics: pip, empirical p, and Holm procedures reimplemented locally

raw_bank_diagnostic.method: max pip over 16 raw rows at each distance; empirical distance null; Holm within global/local families
